title: perideridia rusbyi
intro: Perideridia rusbyi, also known as Rusby's yampah or small yampah, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Carrot family and is native to the northwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Perideridia rusbyi include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture, which can be used to address various health concerns.
